sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96336" key="sta/xi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στάχι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a sort of <sense id="n96336.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vermilion</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2020.tlg001:p.343H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodos.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.343H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
